info.title: Ex Libris APIs
info.description: For more information on how to use these APIs, including how to create an API key required for authentication, see [Alma REST APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis).

externalDocs.description: Detailed documentation on these APIs at the Ex Libris Developer Network.

get.description: Retrieves a Courses list. Number of results can be limited and offset using the query parameters. For example, to receive the first 2 results send offset=0 and limit=2

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. Searching for words from: code, section, name, notes, instructors, searchable_ids, year, academic_department & all (for searching in all the above fields). Examples (note the tilde between the code and text): q=name~Math , q=code~MATH_INTRO and section~2 (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status of the course: ACTIVE/INACTIVE. Default: ALL

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: A few sort options are available: id, name, code, section, start_date, end_date, participants, weekly_hours. A secondary sort key, id, is added when only one sort option is selected. Default sorting is by code and section.

parameters.name: exact_search
parameters.description: When set to true, will only find courses that exactly match your code

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_courses.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_courses.xsd)

requestBody.description: This method takes a Course object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_course.xsd?tags=POST)

400.description:
Bad Request

401908 - 'Course identifier field should be left empty'

401909 - 'Course code and name are mandatory fields'

401922 - 'Course status is mandatory field'

401626 - 'Course unit is not valid'

401666 - 'Parameter is not valid'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_course.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_course.xsd)

get.description: This API is used to test if the API key was configured correctly.It returns a short XML (no schema available - the output is subject to changes) with the following structure:<test>GET - OK - institutionCode: 01ABC_INST</test>

400.description: Bad Request

200.description: OK

post.description: This API is used to test if the API key was configured correctly, including read/write permissions.It returns a short XML (no schema available - the output is subject to changes) with the following structure:<test>POST - OK</test>

400.description: Bad Request

200.description: OK

delete.description: Deletes a Course resource. All reading-lists and citations belonging to the course will be deleted, unless a reading list is attached to another course.

400.description:
Bad Request

401914 - 'Course not found.'

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: To get all related reading-lists and citations use view=full.

post.description: Creates a Reading List object for a Course.

parameters.name: copy_id
parameters.description: The identifier of the list to duplicate. (optional)

parameters.name: default_section
parameters.description: Indication to create a default section. (optional)
